snippet.title: Ko Cha Ra (Official Music Video)
snippet.description: This music video is dedicated to every mother who put her own dreams aside so her children and family could have a better future. ItвАЩs a small tribute to the quiet strength, unconditional love, and countless sacrifices that often go unseen. To every mother who chose her family over her own dreams вАФ thank you. We see you, we honor you, and we love you.

snippet.title: LALIBAZAR - Official Movie Teaser | Swastima Khadka,Rabindra Singh Baniya,Mukunda,Samaira, Prashamsa
snippet.description:
LALIBAZAR - New Nepali Movie Official Teaser 2026 || Swastima Khadka, Bishal Devkota, Rabindra Singh Baniya, Samaira Thapa, Prashamsa Subedi, Mukunda Kumar Shrestha, Abaya Baral, Asha Poudel, Govinda Sunar, Abha Aryal, Tara Sharma, Ramesh Badi, Nabaraj Regmi, Ghana Shyam Joshi, Pradip Dhakal, Mohan Panthi, JB Ruwali, Swarasoti Adhikari, Bhumika Tharu, Sagar Ghimire,Haroon Ali, Prem Pandey || Lalibazar New Nepali Full Movie 2026

snippet.title: JAMESY - NACHANA ft VZN & Hennie Baker (Prod @YogeshBeats)
snippet.description:
вАЬNachanaвАЭ is a high-energy Nepali track inspired by the infectious grooves of Brazilian funk, blended with our own desi flavor. рЯТГрЯПљрЯХЇрЯПљ
This song is all about movement, confidence, and letting the rhythm take overвАФwhen the beat drops, timi NACHANA.

From heavy bass to catchy hooks, вАЬNachanaвАЭ brings global sounds together with a Nepali soul. Turn up the volume, feel the groove, and dance like nobodyвАЩs watching.

рЯОІ Listen. Feel. Nacha

Written and Performed by 

JAMESY
https://www.instagram.com/jamesyboy.dg/

VZN
https://www.instagram.com/jhilkeyvzn/

Hennie Baker
https://www.instagram.com/bakerhennie/

Visuals by NFTP  

Producer-Shristi Karki (Shii) 
Director & Editor-Gaurav Bista   
DOP-Newjal Shrestha  Nhuja Shakya  
Production Manager-Shyam Khadka   
Choreographer-Kritika Baral   
Creative Director-Risheek Pradhan  
Assistant Director-Animesh Deep Shankar   
Casting Director-Rajeev Thapa  
Drone & FPV Pilot-Akash Regmi  
Editor-Gaurav Bista   
Coloring-NFTP  
PD/Art Director-Ghanashyam Shrestha  
Asst.Art-Gyanendra Tamang, Mohan Tamang, Shreeniwash Chaudhary,  Nitesh Gupta   
Asst. production-Anup Khadka, Mahesh GM  
Head Gaffer-Ganesh singh Thakuri  
Lights-Photon films and lights

AC-Ganesh & Niraj Chettri  
Light Man-Madhu Khati(Dhrum), Chaudhary Dai And Team
Crane-LightBenders  
Crane Operators-Prashant Yogi, Bijaya Ramtel(Kale)
Crane Taker-Prakash Shudras
Crane Intern-Shantosh Pariyar   
BTS-XYZ   
Costume Designer-Sujan Ratna Pariyar   
Stylist-Sushmita Rijal (suzustyles)  
Costumes By-Veshbhusa Design studio
Sponsors-OV Education, Riva Natural Spring water  

Cast-PREMA LAMGADE, LIL JHOLA, YOGESHBEATS, LIL LHAKEY, Sujal Bhagat, Rajeev Thapa, XuZeyu Lama, Pramod Panta, Anjan Dhakal, 

Dancers-Lakpa Lama, Prithivu Bhujel, Jivan Lama, Suraj Biru, Aman, Alvish Lama, Dinesh, Jivan tamang  

Special Thanks-Shayuj Pokhrel, Abiskar Gautam, Nj Shakya

snippet.title: ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
Straw Hats! Grab your crew! ONE PIECE: INTO THE GRAND LINE sets sail on March 10th!

MORE INFO ON ONE PIECE: INTO THE GRAND LINE:
NetflixвАЩs epic high-seas pirate adventure, ONE PIECE, returns for Season 2вАФunleashing fiercer adversaries and the most perilous quests yet. Luffy and the Straw Hats set sail for the extraordinary Grand LineвАФa legendary stretch of sea where danger and wonder await at every turn. As they journey through this unpredictable realm in search of the worldвАЩs greatest treasure, theyвАЩll encounter bizarre islands and a host of formidable new enemies.

ABOUT ONE PIECE:
NetflixвАЩs live-action adaptation of ONE PIECE is based on JapanвАЩs highest-selling manga series of all time by Eiichiro Oda, with over 100 volumes and 500M copies sold worldwide. The epic high-seas adventure follows Monkey D. Luffy on his quest to find the legendary fabled treasure, the ONE PIECE, and become King of the Pirates. The beloved franchise has a vast, multigenerational global fan base. Upon its debut in 2023, the Netflix live-action series became a global phenomenon, spending eight weeks on the Global Top 10, reaching #1 in over 75 countries and making history as the first Netflix English-language series to debut at #1 in Japan. The show has nearly 100M views and is one of NetflixвАЩs most downloaded shows of all time. ONE PIECE was nominated for 11 awards at the ChildrenвАЩs & Family Emmy Awards, including Outstanding Young Teen Series. The beloved adaptation offers fans ways to engage year-round, off-screen with a brand new immersive experience set to open at Netflix House and fans can bring the world of the live-action show into their everyday lives with products like LEGO, Moose Toys and more at Netflix Shop and retailers worldwide. ONE PIECE returns for its highly anticipated second season in 2026, and has been renewed for Season 3. The show is created in partnership with Shueisha and is produced by Tomorrow Studios (an ITV Studios partner) and Netflix.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81218765

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the worldвАЩs leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

snippet.title: Sushant KC - Ji Chanta Matina (Official Music Video)

Produced by Uff KC
Mixed/Mastered by Foeseal

Samrakshya | Sushant KC

Production Team: Kapil Sim | Bishal Mahat

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Firfirey | OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO
snippet.description:
Finally releasing 'Firfirey' after 6 years feels a lot, but here we are. I hope this brings back good memories to you as it does to me. This song resonates of pure love and the emotions it holds is immense for me. I can't believe we've come this far.

Thank you for always being a part of the journey !

Written, composed and performed by Yabesh Thapa 

Flute - Shrijan Maharjan
Drums and Additional Percussions - Bikesh Bazra
Mix/Master - Kobid Bazra (Bajra Creation Records)

Visuals by Noisy

Get connected with us
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/?hl=en

#ghaamchhaya

snippet.description:
Flame Music & Nitesh Ujoli proudly present the official teaser of the New Haryanavi Song, "JUSTIN BIEBER" by Elvish Yadav, Anu Amanat. featuring Isha Malviya. The song is penned by Zikar. This  song is produced by Nitesh Ujoli.

snippet.description:
Rikesh Gurung Keys - Ma Timrai Hu | Official Song

#matimraihu #newnepalisong #lovesongnepali 


Lyrics 

[ Sansar Feriyo Timro Ujyalole 
Man Mandirbho Timro Aagamanle ] - 2 
Badliyeka chhan Mero Ranga Haru 
Kaha Nai Janchhu Ma Timrai Ta Hu 

Ma Timrai Hu , Timrai Rahirahu la 
Jati Badha , Aayeni Timrai Aghi Hula 

Bihanile Ghaam , Saajhale Juno 
Parkhirahe Jhai Parkhirahu 
Khola Jhai Timi , Kinara Bhaye Ma 
Bagirahnu , Malai Chhoyi Rahanu 

[Maya Yo Sadhai Bhari 
Bagi Bagi Bagi Rahos 
Timimai Timimai 
Sansar Chali Rahos ] - 2 

Ma Timrai Hu , Timrai Rahula 
Jati Badha Aayeni , Timrai Aghi Hula

Lamjunge Dadaima Hawa Sarara вАУ Hard Rock Tribute Version is a powerful musical dedication to the legendary Nepali icon Sunil Thapa. This special tribute by Ridam Labels blends nostalgic Nepali essence with electrifying hard rock energy to honor his unforgettable legacy.

snippet.title: Island of POOR vs Island of HACKER vs Island of Avaritia in Minecraft!
snippet.description:
Today, Kartik and Gauri and Nalla Scientist face off in the Battle of the Islands: Poor vs. Millionaire. They'll each start on a different island, but Kartik will pretend to be a hacker to troll his friends and win. Will Gauri, Nalla Scientist catch on? Don't miss it!

Tere Dil Diyaan Raahan

Main Karun Intezar Tera
Tu Dil Tui-Yon Jaan Meri

snippet.title: Mera Dard Tum Na Samjh Sake | Broken Vibes | Heart Touching Qawwali Sad Song | Emotional Pain Song
snippet.description:
Mera Dard Tum Na Samjh Sake ek dil ko chhoo lene wala emotional song hai, jo un logon ke liye hai jinka dard lafzon se zyada gehra hota hai.
Ye gaana un yaadon, un aansuon aur us khamoshi ko bayan karta hai jise koi samajh nahi paata.
Agar aap broken vibes, heart touching sad songs, aur deep emotional music pasand karte hain, to ye song aapke dil tak zaroor pahuchega рЯТФ
рЯОІ Headphones lagakar sunein aur apne dard ko mehsoos kareinвА¶

snippet.title: Lana Del Rey вАУ Young And Beautiful (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
рЯОІ Welcome to Paradise рЯМі
Your Home For The Best Urban Music With Lyrics!

вАЬLana Del Rey вАУ Young And BeautifulвАЭ Lyrics / Lyric Video brought to you by Urban Paradise

вПђ вАЬMight Just - Ella MaiвАЭ Out Now: 
https://24kgoldn.lnk.to/Prada

вЪ°пЄП  This just how it is, no more what it was

рЯФФ Click the bell to stay updated on the best Lyrics / Lyric Videos from Urban Paradise!

вЬЕ Follow all the music from Paradise Music on Spotify Playlists here!
https://open.spotify.com/user/wavemusвАЛ...

вЦґпЄП Urban Paradise:
https://www.instagram.com/UrbanparadiseytвАЛ
https://www.facebook.com/UrbanparadiseytвАЛ
https://twitter.com/UrbanparadiseytвАЛ
Artist Links:
рЯУЇ Zara Larsson YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@A$AP Rocky

[Verse 1]
I've seen the world, done it all
Had my cake now
Diamonds, brilliant, and Bel Air now
 
[Pre-Chorus]
Hot summer nights, mid-July
When you and I were forever wild
The crazy days, city lights
The way you'd play with me like a child

[Chorus]
Will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothing but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?

[Verse 2]
I've seen the world, lit it up as my stage now
Channeling angels in the new age now

[Pre-Chorus]
Hot summer days, rock and roll
The way you'd play for me at your show
And all the ways I got to know
Your pretty face and electric soul

[Chorus]
Will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothing but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?

[Bridge]
Dear Lord, when I get to Heaven
Please, let me bring my man
When he comes, tell me that You'll let him in
Father, tell me if You can
All that grace, all that body
All that face makes me wanna party
He's my sun, he makes me shine like diamonds

[Chorus]
And will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothin' but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?

[Outro]
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?
Will you still love me when I'm not young and beautiful?

Tags
#LanaDelRey #YoungAndBeautiful #NewMusic #PopMusic #Lyrics #LyricVideo #OfficialLyrics #LanaDelReyMusic #TrendingMusic #TopHits2025 #NewMusic2025 #UrbanParadise

minor spoilers below

featuring: @LettuceK @JadenMAN @minutetechmc @PrinceZam @MapiccMc @jumperwho @PurpledMC @Boosfer @Lomedy @fymada @HoraceMinecraft @TheobaldTheBird 

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 
https://www.youtube.com/@andreaszoeller (bunch of the cool minecraft ost remixes!)

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

Hum bhi tode hain gaye
Aise tanha to na the Tanha chode hain gaye

Na dil se vo yaadein jaayein
Na raaton ko neendein aayein
Aate hain phir khwab kyu
Aate hain kyu khaab
Jo thi tere ishq mein doobi
Un ankhon mein tum le aaye
Aasu behisaab kyu
Aasu behisaab
Khair hai yaaron kam se kam
Jaan se jaa na paaye hum
Khair hai yaaron kam se kam
Jaan se jaa na paaye hum
Inkaar ke bahaane kayi baar karte karte

Humne wahin lagaya dil
Jahaan dil lagana mana tha
Akhir wahin kiye sajde jahan
Sar jhukana mana tha
Kyu zindagi bita di jahaan pe
ik pal bitaana mana tha
Kyu us gali mein rehte they hum
Jahaan roz jaana mana tha

Zamaane ki taraah
Hum bhi tode hain gaye
Aise tanha to na the Tanha chode hain gaye
Jo duaayein dete they
Haan usi ke hothon se
Aise waise lafz bhi
Humse bole hain gaye

baitho kisi roz tanhai mein
Rakho samne wakt ke aaine
Jo aagea chehra nazar vo kahin
Tumhe bewafa kehke has na pade

Tujhe dil diya istemaal huye
Hai tujhmein bhi dil ye khayaal rahe
Tujhe dil diya istemaal huye
Hai tujhmein bhi dil ye khayaal rahe

Humne jalaaya dil jahaan diye bhi jalaana mana tha
Kar baithe yaad vo chehra jisko bhulaana mana tha
Hum aazmaye gaye magar unhe aazmana mana tha
Humne wahin lagaya dil jahan dil lagana mana tha

Aise tanha to na the Tanha chode hain gaye

snippet.title: Ruth B. - Dandelions (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Ruth B. - Dandelions
Stream/Download:

(Lyrics):
Maybe it's the way you say my name
Maybe it's the way you play your game
But it's so good, I've never known anybody like you
But it's so good, I've never dreamed of nobody like you

[Pre-Chorus]
And I've heard of a love that comes once in a lifetime
And I'm pretty sure that you are that love of mine

[Chorus]
'Cause I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Verse 2]
I think that you are the one for me
Cause it gets so hard to breathe
When you're looking at me
I've never felt so alive and free
When you're looking at me
I've never felt so happy

[Pre-Chorus]
And I've heard of a love that comes once in a lifetime
And I'm pretty sure that you are that love of mine

[Chorus]
Cause I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Bridge]
Dandelion into the wind you go
Won't you let my darling know?
Dandelion into the wind you go
Won't you let my darling know that

[Chorus]
I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Outro]
I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine

snippet.title: Franklin Traps ALL DEADLY GHOST Inside Evil Watch in Indian Bike Driving 3D! рЯШ±
snippet.description:
#NessFitGamer #gta 5 #gta5hindi #gta5mods 

Franklin Traps ALL DEADLY GHOST Inside Evil Watch in Indian Bike Driving 3D! рЯШ±

In this story, Shinchan and Franklin get trapped inside another world created by the Evil Watch. The demon inside the watch traps them and takes Shinchan away with him. To save Shinchan, Franklin must trap all the ghosts and monsters that were released from the Evil Watch back inside it. These include Granny, Huggy Wuggy, Mr. Meat, Choo-Choo Charles, Kamla , and the Pennywise. Will Franklin be able to save Shinchan or not? Watch the full scary story to find out!

Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/nessfitgamer01?igsh=MTBudmpzZGdnZXljNg==

I hope you guys enjoyed this video if you did please consider to like the video and subscribe the channel. вЭ§пЄП

Some 3D assets and mods are sourced from community modders and are used for fan-made cinematic purposes.
No ownership is claimed over any third-party assets.

Disclaimer:
This video is made using GTA 5, with Indian Bike Driving 3D assets added inside the game.

This is NOT actual gameplay of Indian Bike Driving 3D. Everything shown is custom-made using GTA mods. All characters and events shown in this video are fictional and created for entertainment purpose.
 
This is a fan-made, fictional, and transformative video that falls under Fair Use (Section 107) for commentary, parody, and storytelling.

Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for вАЬfair useвАЭ for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education, and research.

Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statutes that might otherwise be infringing.

Song Credits:

Music Director: Anu Malik

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Tips Films
Director: Abbas-Mustan
Cast: Bobby Deol, Preity Zinta, Suresh Oberoi, Rakhee Gulzar, Farida Jalal, Johnny Lever, Dalip Tahil

Deke Dard-E-JigarAage Peechhe Dolkar

#bhajan #bhaktisagar #relaxing
#bhaktisagar #bhajan  #shiv  #relaxing  #shiva  #bollywood  #bholenath  #bhakti  #omnamahshivaya 


#omnamahshivaya  #Meditation #Om #meditation music
Welcome to this calming meditation session where we explore the power of chanting the sacred mantra "Om Namah Shivaya." This powerful mantra is not just a chant; it is a doorway to inner peace, healing, and spiritual transformation.

In this video, I guide you through the practice of chanting "Om Namah Shivaya," helping you connect with the divine energy of Lord Shiva, the source of creation and destruction. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced meditator, this practice is a simple yet profound way to quiet the mind, relax the body, and bring balance to your life.

Benefits of Chanting "Om Namah Shivaya":

Reduces stress and anxiety
Brings clarity and mental peace
Enhances spiritual connection
Promotes physical and emotional healing
Balances the mind, body, and soul
How to Practice:

Find a quiet and comfortable place.
Focus on your breath to relax and center yourself.
Chant "Om Namah Shivaya" along with your breath.
Visualize Lord Shiva or simply let the vibration of the mantra guide you inward.
Feel the calming effects as you continue chanting.
Chanting this mantra can help you align with your true self and experience deep meditation. Let this video be a reminder that peace is just a breath away.

Don't forget to LIKE, COMMENT, and SUBSCRIBE for more spiritual practices, meditation guides, and tips for a peaceful life.

snippet.title: Machar ko leke bapuji Hogaye bhide pe ghussa! | FULL MOVIE | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Step into JethalalвАЩs world with Gada Electronics!  Manage the shop, tackle quirky customers, and experience nonstop TMKOC-style fun. 

Are you ready for the challenge? 
Play now: https://gadaelectronics.page.link/dhgB  
#GadaElectronics #TMKOCGame

Watch the FULL MOVIE of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLPbh-P_C0BzSk2_rPKNCDcjNAA8vaDN-E&si=rC5AotwLD2r3MHna

Click here to watch NEW Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLPbh-P_C0BzSxhJ6UCi6tgujD-FsAy0sw

Click here to watch your favourite videos from Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta', is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' and a mischievous son 'Tapu'. Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalal' to call his father 'Champaklal' from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Nitish Bhaluni / Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu)
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Sachin Shroff / Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Sunayana Fozdar / Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Jheel Mehta / Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani / Khushi Mali as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu)
Gurucharan Singh / Balwinder Singh Suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal / Monaz Mevawala as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Samay Shah as Gurucharan Singh Roshan Singh Sodhi (Gogi)
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah / Dharmit Turakhia as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Kuldeep Gor as Ratan Binjola
Dharti Bhatt as Rupa Baditop Binjola
Akshaan Sehrawat as Veer
Maahi Bhadra as Bansari
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku
Ghanshyam Nayak / Kiran Bhatt as Nattu Kaka
Tanmay Vekaria as Bagha
Navina Wadekar / Monika Bhadoriya as Bawri
Daya Shankar Pandey as Chalu Pandey
Rakesh Bedi as Taarak's Boss
Mayur Vakani as Sundarlal
Kanti Joshi as Baka

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh 
Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh Bajaj
Editor: Dinesh Gosavi, Kaushal Mistry, Devang Modi, Vinod Maurya
Creative Supervision: Krunal Khakhkhar
Operation Head: Sohil Ramani
Written By: Raju Odedra & Rajen Upadhyay
Directors: Harshad Joshi, Malav Suresh Rajda

Television Adaptation and Designed By: Asit Kumarr Modi

 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/tmkoc_ntf

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta', is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' and a mischievous son 'Tapu'. Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalal' to call his father 'Champaklal' from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

snippet.title: Sushant Bhujel - Ek Choti ft.Sujana Syangbo & Sujan Moktan  (OFFICIAL MV)
snippet.description:
вАЬEk ChotiвАЭ вАУ This song is about a village boy and girl who fall in love. Their love is pure and strong, but the girlвАЩs father does not accept their relationship. Because of this, they face many problems and feel heartbroken. In the end, they decide to run away together so they can stay united and protect their love.

The music video was shot in Lurpung village, showing the natural beauty, simple village life, and the true feelings of young love.

рЯЯҐStream this song on:
https://ditto.fm/ek-choti

рЯО§ Vocals : Myself (Sushant Bhujel Tamang)
https://www.instagram.com/sushant_bhuzel/

https://open.spotify.com/artist/64sKQq4agX9GHUkeQIsfRx?si=G7XDeFaoSV6AgiZMFbN4qg
https://www.tiktok.com/@sushant.bhujel2
рЯТЄProducer: Top Bdr Bhujel
рЯОґ Outro Vocals: Sujan Moktan
рЯОґ Female Vocals : Aakriti Dulal
https://www.instagram.com/aakriti_dulal/

рЯОЉ Music Produced and mix/Mastering: Kila Music
https://www.instagram.com/kilamusic4u/

рЯОђVisuals: Plug Substance
https://www.instagram.com/plug.substance/

DOP and cinematographer : Sujab Banjara
https://www.instagram.com/sujav_banjara/
Directed By Nemey Youngin
https://www.instagram.com/nemeyyoungins/

Cast: Sujana Syangbo & Sujan Moktan
https://www.instagram.com/sujana_syangbo/
https://www.instagram.com/kilamusic4u/

Choreography: Salav Maharjan and Sujana Syangbo
Makeup Artist: Evani Khadgi
 https://www.instagram.com/evanikhadgilama/

рЯО§ Recorded at : Clouds Records 
https://www.instagram.com/clouds_records_official/

рЯПЂLocation : Lurpung, Karve
Side Casts: Salav Maharjan, Sushant Bhujel, Manisha Shrestha, Prakriti Pakhrin, Evani Khadgi, Basil Gurung, Nima lama, Chyangba Maya lama

IвАЩve poured my memories and emotions into this oneвАФhope it touches your heart too. рЯТЩ

(Bholenath Shankara)

snippet.title: 4 Minecraft Pros VS 2500 Players
snippet.description:
On the Unstable SMP, I assembled the best team of players to fight back against the LAW and my greatest enemy, Leo! This is how I Fought a War with Parrot, FlameFrags, and WemmbuвА¶

4 Minecraft Pros VS 2500 Players


Unstable SMP Members
вЮЬ @wemmbumc 
вЮЬ @FlameFragsMC 
вЮЬ @ParrotX2 
вЮЬ @Spokeishere 





possible spoilers below this point

Features: @ParrotX2 @wemmbumc @FlameFragsMC @Leowook @jumperwho @MapiccMc @PrinceZam @minutetechmc @LettuceK eggchan @TheobaldTheBird @JadenMAN @PurpledMC @fymada @HoraceMinecraft @Lomedy 

music: 
Ivory /  @ivoryfrill  &  @MythrodakTV  
DM DOKURO /  @DMDOKURO  
Chris Christodoulou /  @AstronautDown 
Pascal Stiefel /  @Plasma3Music  
Lena Raine / @LenaRaine 
C418 / @C418
Peter McConnell

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where Spoke, Wemmbu, FlameFrags, and ParrotX2 aim to tell the best stories possible. btw a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

written, recorded, & edited by spoke

snippet.title: Shiv Tandav Stotram | Shankar Mahadevan | а§∞а§Ња§µа§£ а§∞а§Ъа§ња§§ а§ґа§ња§µ а§§а§Ња§Ва§°а§µ а§Єа•На§§а•Ла§§а•На§∞ | Mahashivratri Special 2026
snippet.description:
Times Music Spiritual presents вАШShiv Tandav StotramвАЩ, a powerful and sacred Shiv song traditionally written by Ravana, & sung by Shankar Mahadevan. This Shiv tandav composition praises the strength of Lord Shiva. With powerful Sanskrit verses & Shankar MahadevanвАЩs dynamic vocals, the Shiv stotram captures the intensity of ShivaвАЩs Tandav - the celestial dance of creation & destruction.

According to legend, Ravana, the great devotee of Lord Shiva, composed the Shiv Tandav Stotram to praise Mahadev after trying to lift Mount Kailash. Impressed by his devotion and dedication, Lord Shiva blessed him with immense power and wisdom.

The importance of Shiv Tandav Stotram lies in its spiritual vibrations & powerful meaning. Chanting or listening to it is believed to remove fear, negative energy, and obstacles while bringing confidence, mental strength, and inner stability. It energizes the mind, improves focus, and fills devotees with courage. Check out the song now & immerse yourself in the divine energy of Bholenath. Har Har Mahadev! рЯФ±

#ShivTandav #ShankarMahadevan #ShivBhajan #ShivTandavStotram  #ShivTandavStotra  #BholenathSong #ShivSong #а§ґа§ња§µа§§а§Ња§Ва§°а§µа§Єа•На§§а•Ла§§а•На§∞  #BholenathSong #Mahadev #Mahashivratri #OmNamahShivaya #MahashivratriSpecial

Shiv Tandav Stotram Lyrics in English:

Jatatavigalajjala pravahapavitasthale

Galeavalambya lambitam bhujangatungamalikam

Damad damad damaddama ninadavadamarvayam

Chakara chandtandavam tanotu nah shivah shivam

ata kata hasambhrama bhramanilimpanirjhari

Vilolavichivalarai virajamanamurdhani

Dhagadhagadhagajjva lalalata pattapavake

Kishora chandrashekhare ratih pratikshanam mama

Dharadharendrana ndinivilasabandhubandhura

Sphuradigantasantati pramodamanamanase

Krupakatakshadhorani nirudhadurdharapadi

Kvachidigambare manovinodametuvastuni

Jata bhujan gapingala sphuratphanamaniprabha

Kadambakunkuma dravapralipta digvadhumukhe

Madandha sindhu rasphuratvagutariyamedure

Mano vinodamadbhutam bibhartu bhutabhartari

Sahasra lochana prabhritya sheshalekhashekhara

Prasuna dhulidhorani vidhusaranghripithabhuh

Bhujangaraja malaya nibaddhajatajutaka

Shriyai chiraya jayatam chakora bandhushekharah

Lalata chatvarajvaladhanajnjayasphulingabha

nipitapajnchasayakam namannilimpanayakam

Sudha mayukha lekhaya virajamanashekharam

Maha kapali sampade shirojatalamastunah

Karala bhala pattikadhagaddhagaddhagajjvala

Ddhanajnjaya hutikruta prachandapajnchasayake

Dharadharendra nandini kuchagrachitrapatraka

Prakalpanaikashilpini trilochane ratirmama

navina megha mandali niruddhadurdharasphurat

Kuhu nishithinitamah prabandhabaddhakandharah

nilimpanirjhari dharastanotu krutti sindhurah

Kalanidhanabandhurah shriyam jagaddhurandharah

Praphulla nila pankaja prapajnchakalimchatha

Vdambi kanthakandali raruchi prabaddhakandharam

Smarachchidam purachchhidam bhavachchidam makhachchidam

Gajachchidandhakachidam tamamtakachchidam bhaje

Akharvagarvasarvamangala kalakadambamajnjari

Rasapravaha madhuri vijrumbhana madhuvratam

Smarantakam purantakam bhavantakam makhantakam

Gajantakandhakantakam tamantakantakam bhaje

Jayatvadabhravibhrama bhramadbhujangamasafur

Dhigdhigdhi nirgamatkarala bhaal havyavat

Dhimiddhimiddhimidhva nanmrudangatungamangala

Dhvanikramapravartita prachanda tandavah shivah

Drushadvichitratalpayor bhujanga mauktikasrajor

Garishtharatnaloshthayoh suhrudvipakshapakshayoh

Trushnaravindachakshushoh prajamahimahendrayoh

Sama pravartayanmanah kada sadashivam bhaje

Kada nilimpanirjhari nikujnjakotare vasanh

Vimuktadurmatih sada shirah sthamajnjalim vahanh

Vimuktalolalochano lalamabhalalagnakah

Shiveti mantramuchcharan sada sukhi bhavamyaham

Imam hi nityameva muktamuttamottamam stavam

Pathansmaran bruvannaro vishuddhimeti santatam

Hare gurau subhaktimashu yati nanyatha gatim

Vimohanam hi dehinam sushankarasya chintanam


Shiv Mantras Playlist for Maha Shivratri 2026- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RbRKFIToB68&list=PLb3Q3uO5VVFKGRZiS4V00tcGej_kSEYBk&pp=sAgC

snippet.title: Tandavam - Live in Dubai | Rishab Rikhiram Sharma | Mahashivratri Special [OUT NOW!]
snippet.description:
Tandavam вАФ the cosmic pulse of Mahadev. рЯФ±

Also known as The Shiv Tandav Stotram, this sacred hymn attributed to Ravana glorifies Lord ShivaвАЩs cosmic dance вАФ symbolising creation, preservation and destruction. Across 16 powerful rhythmic verses, it paints a vivid portrait of Shiva: matted locks flowing with the Ganga, serpents adorning his neck, ash-smeared divinity, the crescent moon, and the thunderous resonance of the damaru.

This performance at Coca-Cola Arena, Dubai, in the presence of 15,000 people, was my offering of 4 of these 16 verses вАФ a moment where devotion met magnitude.

Verse 1:
Jatatavigalajjala pravahapavitasthale
Galeavalambya lambitam bhujangatungamalikam
Damad damad damaddama ninadavadamarvayam
Chakara chandtandavam tanotu nah shivah shivam

With his neck consecrated by the flow of water that flows from his hair,
And on his neck a snake, which is hung like a garland,
And the Damaru drum that emits the sound "Damat Damat Damat Damat",
Lord Shiva did the auspicious dance of Tandava. May he give prosperity to all of us.

Verse 2:
Jata kata hasambhrama bhramanilimpanirjhari
Vilolavichivalarai virajamanamurdhani
Dhagadhagadhagajjva lalalata pattapavake
Kishora chandrashekhare ratih pratikshanam mama

I have a deep interest in Shiva
Whose head is glorified by the rows of moving waves of the celestial Ganga river,
Which stir in the deep well of his hair in tangled locks.
Who has the brilliant fire burning on the surface of his forehead,
And who has the crescent moon as a jewel on his head.

Verse 3:
Dharadharendrana ndinivilasabandhubandhura
Sphuradigantasantati pramodamanamanase
Krupakatakshadhorani nirudhadurdharapadi
Kvachidigambare manovinodametuvastuni

May my mind seek happiness in Lord Shiva,
In whose mind all the living beings of the glorious universe exist,
Who is the companion of Parvati (daughter of the mountain king),
Who controls unsurpassed adversity with his compassionate gaze, Which is all-pervading
And who wears the Heavens as his raiment.

Verse 4:
Jata bhujan gapingala sphuratphanamaniprabha
Kadambakunkuma dravapralipta digvadhumukhe
Madandha sindhu rasphuratvagutariyamedure
Mano vinodamadbhutam bibhartu bhutabhartari

Through rhythm, movement and sound, this was not just choreography, it was invocation.

Chanting the Shiv Tandav Stotram is believed to bestow strength, clarity, mental peace and spiritual liberation. Performing it on a stage of this scale was a reminder that devotion does not diminish in grand spaces вАФ it expands.

This is TƒБбєЗбЄНavam.
This is surrender.
This is Shiva.

Har Har Mahadev. рЯФ±

вАФ Rishab*

#ShivTandav #Tandavam #Mahadev #LiveAtCCA #Dubai #IndianClassical #SpiritualMusic
